zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Bowes於1350年出生在英國波藍德格斯托可時，她的父親Robert Bowes40歲，母親Elizabeth De Leybourne40歲。她於1385年之前與Sir William Threlkeld III結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1409年8月15日在英國英格蘭波藍德雷爾可爾德享年59歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Bowes于1350年出生在英国波藍德格斯托可时，她的父亲Robert Bowes40岁，母亲Elizabeth De Leybourne40岁。她于1385年之前与Sir William Threlkeld III结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1409年8月15日在英国英格兰波藍德雷爾可爾德享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bowes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Bowes (formerly in North Yorkshire, now in County Durham), or from some other place so called, the placename being derived from the plural of Old English boga ‘bow’, here referring to bends in a river. Alternatively, a topographic name for someone who lived ‘(at the) arches or bridge’. See Bow 1.
English: variant of Bow , with excrescent -s.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Buadhaigh (see Bogue ).

variants.name: Bow
meanings: Scottish and English: habitational name from any of various minor places called with Old English boga ‘bow, arch, vault’, i.e. an arched bridge. There are places so called in Midlothian, Middlesex, and Devon.
Irish and English: variant of   Bowes  .

Chinese: possibly from Cantonese form of the Chinese names 寶 (meaning ‘treasure’) or 保 (meaning ‘protect’), which were monosyllabic personal names or part of disyllabic personal names of some early Chinese immigrants in the US.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Bowes was born in 1350, in Greystoke, Cumberland, England, her father, Robert Bowes, was 40 and her mother, Elizabeth De Leybourne, was 40. She married Sir William Threlkeld III before 1385. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 15 August 1409, in Threlkeld, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Bowes est née en 1350, à Greystoke, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Robert Bowes, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth De Leybourne, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Threlkeld III avant 1385. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 15 août 1409, à Threlkeld, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Bowes 1350 in Greystoke, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Bowes 40 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth De Leybourne 40. Sie hat vor 1385 Sir William Threlkeld III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. August 1409 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Threlkeld, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Bowes è nata il nel 1350 nel Greystoke, Cumberland, England, sua padre, Robert Bowes, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth De Leybourne, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Threlkeld III prima del 1385. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 15 agosto 1409, nel Threlkeld, Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Bowes(이)가 1350년 영국 c벌랜드 그리스토크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Bowes(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth De Leybourne(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1385년 이전 Sir William Threlkeld III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1409년 8월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드 스렐켈드에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Bowes nasceu em 1350, em Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Bowes, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth De Leybourne, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Threlkeld III antes 1385. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 15 de agosto de 1409, em Threlkeld, Cumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 59 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Bowes родилась в 1350 г. в местности гристок, кумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert Bowes было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth De Leybourne, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Threlkeld III перед 1385 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 15 августа 1409 г. в местности трелкелд, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Bowes nació en 1350, en Greystoke, Cumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Bowes, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Elizabeth De Leybourne, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Sir William Threlkeld III antes de 1385. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 15 de agosto de 1409, en Threlkeld, Cumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años.
